acceptance.title: 1. Acceptance of Terms
acceptance.content: By accessing or using Servantana, you agree to be bound by these Terms. If you do not agree, do not use our platform.

service.title: 2. Service Description
service.content: Servantana is a marketplace connecting customers with independent cleaning professionals. We do not employ cleaners directly and are not responsible for the quality of services provided.

accounts.title: 3. User Accounts
accounts.content: You are responsible for maintaining the confidentiality of your account credentials and for all activities under your account. You must provide accurate information and be at least 18 years old.

payments.title: 4. Payments
payments.content: All payments are processed through third-party providers. Fees are non-refundable except as required by law. Cleaners set their own rates and are responsible for their own taxes.

liability.title: 5. Limitation of Liability
liability.content: Servantana is provided "as is" without warranties. We are not liable for any damages arising from use of the platform, disputes between users, or actions of service providers. Our total liability shall not exceed the fees paid to us in the last 12 months.

termination.title: 6. Termination
termination.content: We may suspend or terminate accounts at our discretion for violations of these terms or for any reason with or without notice.

changes.title: 7. Changes to Terms
changes.content: We may modify these terms at any time. Continued use after changes constitutes acceptance of the new terms.

collection.title: 1. Information We Collect
collection.content: We collect information you provide (name, email, phone, address) and automatically collected data (IP address, device info, usage data) to operate our services.

use.title: 2. How We Use Information
use.content: We use your information to provide and improve our services, process payments, communicate with you, and ensure platform safety.

sharing.title: 3. Information Sharing
sharing.content: We share information with service providers for bookings, payment processors, and as required by law. We do not sell your personal data.

security.title: 4. Data Security
security.content: We implement reasonable security measures but cannot guarantee absolute security. You are responsible for keeping your account credentials secure.

rights.title: 5. Your Rights
rights.content: You may access, update, or delete your account information at any time. Contact us to exercise your data rights.

contact.title: 6. Contact
contact.content: For privacy questions, contact us through the platform or at support@servantana.com.

what.title: 1. What Are Cookies?
what.content: Cookies are small text files stored on your device when you visit our website. They help us remember your preferences and understand how you use our platform.

types.title: 2. Types of Cookies We Use
types.content: We use several types of cookies for different purposes:

essential.title: Essential Cookies
essential.content: Required for the website to function properly. These cannot be disabled.

functional.title: Functional Cookies
functional.content: Remember your preferences like language and location settings.

analytics.title: Analytics Cookies
analytics.content: Help us understand how visitors interact with our website to improve user experience.

marketing.title: Marketing Cookies
marketing.content: Used to deliver relevant advertisements and track campaign performance.

manage.title: 3. Managing Cookies
manage.content: You can control cookies through your browser settings. Note that disabling certain cookies may affect website functionality. Most browsers allow you to block or delete cookies.

thirdParty.title: 4. Third-Party Cookies
thirdParty.content: Some cookies are placed by third-party services we use, such as analytics providers and payment processors. These parties have their own privacy policies.

contact.title: 5. Contact Us
contact.content: If you have questions about our cookie policy, please contact us at support@servantana.com.

footer.description: Connecting you with trusted cleaning professionals.

about.title: About Servantana
about.subtitle: We're the largest workforce marketplace to connect skilled professionals with people who need their services.

mission.title: Our Mission
mission.content: We believe everyone deserves access to reliable, skilled professionals. Our mission is to create meaningful work opportunities while making it easy for customers to find trusted help for any task.

story.title: Our Story
story.content1: Servantana was founded in 2024 with a simple idea: make it easier for people to find reliable help. We noticed that while skilled professionals were everywhere, connecting them with customers who needed their services was unnecessarily difficult.
story.content2: Today, we're proud to have built a platform that empowers thousands of professionals to grow their businesses while helping customers get things done with confidence.

trust.title: Trust
trust.content: We verify every professional and protect every transaction to ensure peace of mind.

quality.title: Quality
quality.content: We maintain high standards and only work with skilled, reliable professionals.

innovation.title: Innovation
innovation.content: We continuously improve our platform to make hiring help easier than ever.

careers.title: Join Our Team
careers.subtitle: Help us build the future of work. We're looking for passionate people who want to make a difference.

growth.title: Career Growth
growth.content: Grow your skills and advance your career in a fast-paced startup environment.

remote.title: Remote First
remote.content: Work from anywhere. We believe in flexibility and work-life balance.

benefits.title: Great Benefits
benefits.content: Competitive salary, equity, health insurance, and unlimited PTO.

noPosition.title: Don't see a role that fits?
noPosition.content: We're always looking for talented people. Send us your resume and we'll keep you in mind for future opportunities.

press.title: Press & Media
press.subtitle: News, updates, and resources for journalists and media professionals.

logos.title: Brand Logos
logos.content: Download our logo in various formats for press use.

contact.title: Press Contact
contact.content: For media inquiries, interview requests, or press kit access, please contact our press team.

faq.title: Frequently Asked Questions
faq.subtitle: Find answers to the most common questions about Servantana.

whatIsServantana.question: What is Servantana?
whatIsServantana.answer: Servantana is a marketplace that connects customers with skilled professionals for various services including cleaning, repairs, personal care, and more. We verify all professionals and provide secure payment processing.

howToBook.question: How do I book a professional?
howToBook.answer: Simply select a category, choose a profession, browse available professionals in your area, select one based on their ratings and reviews, choose your preferred date and time, and confirm your booking. It's that easy!

paymentMethods.question: What payment methods are accepted?
paymentMethods.answer: We accept all major credit cards, debit cards, and PayPal. Payments are processed securely through our platform, and you're only charged after the service is completed.

cancellation.question: What is the cancellation policy?
cancellation.answer: You can cancel or reschedule a booking up to 24 hours before the scheduled time at no charge. Cancellations within 24 hours may be subject to a cancellation fee.

workerVerification.question: How are professionals verified?
workerVerification.answer: All professionals undergo a verification process that includes identity verification, background checks, and skill assessment. We also collect and display reviews from previous customers.

becomeWorker.question: How do I become a professional on Servantana?
becomeWorker.answer: Sign up for a professional account, complete your profile, submit required documents for verification, and once approved, you can start accepting bookings and growing your business.

pricing.question: How is pricing determined?
pricing.answer: Professionals set their own rates based on their experience and the services they offer. All prices are displayed upfront before booking, with no hidden fees.

safety.question: Is Servantana safe to use?
safety.answer: Yes! We prioritize safety with verified professionals, secure payments, and a rating system. We also provide customer support and a satisfaction guarantee on all bookings.

contact.title: Still have questions?
contact.content: Can't find what you're looking for? Our support team is happy to help.
